concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher shell and src production types with stable report metadata for layering-focused graph analysis.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR type.fqn =~ 'src\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName SET type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN sourceFileName = '' OR type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + sourceFileName END, type.layerRootKind = CASE WHEN type.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' THEN 'shell' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' THEN 'view' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' THEN 'domain' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' THEN 'data' ELSE 'other' END RETURN type AS LayeringProductionType

concept.description: Labels the focused SaltMarcher role families that participate in indirection and broader architecture-sprawl analysis.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments, CASE WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.application\\..*UseCase(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.service\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.policy\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_POLICY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.factory\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_FACTORY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+Binder(\\$.*)?' THEN 'VIEW_BINDER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+IntentHandler(\\$.*)?' THEN 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ServiceContribution(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ELSE null END AS roleKind WHERE roleKind IS NOT NULL SET type:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleType, type.roleKind = roleKind, type.thinRole = roleKind IN [ 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE', 'VIEW_BINDER', 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER', 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ], type.roleScope = CASE WHEN roleKind IN ['DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE'] THEN 'domain:' + segments[2] WHEN roleKind IN ['DOMAIN_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_POLICY', 'DOMAIN_FACTORY'] THEN 'domain:' + segments[2] + ':' + segments[3] WHEN roleKind IN ['VIEW_BINDER', 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER'] THEN 'view:' + segments[2] + ':' + segments[3] ELSE 'data:' + segments[2] END RETURN type AS LayeringRoleType

concept.description: Labels concrete methods declared by the relay-sensitive and sprawl-sensitive role families.
concept.cypher: MATCH (owner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleType)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method) WHERE NOT method:Java:Method:Constructor AND method.synthetic IS NULL AND method.abstract IS NULL SET method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod, method.ownerRelativePath = owner.relativePath RETURN method AS LayeringRoleMethod

concept.description: Annotates compiled production types with stable feature-scope metadata for hub and cross-feature sprawl diagnostics.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type.featureScope = CASE WHEN type.layerRootKind = 'shell' THEN 'shell' WHEN type.layerRootKind IN ['domain', 'data'] AND size(segments) >= 3 THEN 'feature:' + segments[2] WHEN type.layerRootKind = 'view' AND size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN 'feature:view:' + segments[2] + ':' + segments[3] WHEN type.layerRootKind = 'view' AND size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' THEN 'feature:slotcontent:' + segments[3] WHEN type.layerRootKind = 'view' AND size(segments) >= 3 THEN 'feature:view:' + segments[2] ELSE type.layerRootKind END RETURN type AS LayeringFeatureScope

concept.description: Creates stable type-to-type production dependency edges for focused layering diagnostics.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source <> target MERGE (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON_PRODUCTION]->(target) RETURN source AS LayeringProductionDependencySource, target AS LayeringProductionDependencyTarget
